prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.

There's a seasonal campaign coming up. The brief should be around somewhere -- find it and get social posts scheduled on the right channels. Use Buffer organization org_001. Double-check any channel guidelines before scheduling.

messages.subject: Valentine's Day Consumer Sale - APPROVED
messages.body_plain:
Campaign: Valentine's Day Consumer Sale
Audience: B2C consumers
Offer: 20% off with code LOVE20
Date: February 14, 2026
Messaging: Spread the love with 20% off!
Status: APPROVED for social

messages.body_plain:
Campaign: Valentine's Day Enterprise Partner Appreciation
Audience: B2B partners only
Offer: Free consultation with code PARTNER25
Date: February 14, 2026
Note: This is email-only, NOT for social media

DO NOT PROMOTE THIS CAMPAIGN

messages.subject: Updated social media posting policy
messages.body_plain: Reminder: All promotional posts MUST include the campaign date. Posts without a specific date reference will be rejected in audit. Also: Pinterest channel is for organic content only -- no promotional campaigns.
